text: 👋 Received! Chat routing works. This is Conductor responding from Telegram session.
✅ Round two. Chat is bidirectional now.
I'm not sure if it's live or I have to reload. Send another short one quick pls
🏓 Ping! If you see this without reloading, polling works.
It does. The ui rebuilt in the chat window/area. But otherwise it worked
Nice! The flash is a known issue — full DOM rebuild on each poll. Will fix with incremental append (only add new messages). Quick CSS transition would smooth it too.
Will you do it in this session? I mean, that's the appropriate session for this task, right?
